ops.title: Purge residual semble mentions from settings fragments fleet-wide
ops.description: Found via daily (2026-07-17): its settings-overrides.fragment.json carried enabledMcpjsonServers:["semble"], so rendered settings.json still mentioned semble after the .mcp.json drop (inert but visible). Other repos may carry the same remnant from the pre-facade era. Fold into the parent rollout verify (backlog task 5b82118): sweep settings.json + fragments for semble, fix via overrides-fragment edit + render + scoped ship. daily itself already fixed in-session.

ops.text: grep -rl semble across every fleet repo .claude/settings.json and .claude/fragments/ returns zero hits (enabledMcpjsonServers remnants included)
each fixed repo re-rendered with cc-guides check green and shipped scoped
